name: project-execution-project-start

checklist.summary: User replied 'pass' to confirm the updated checklist.

tested.summary: User confirmed acceptance passed for Project Execution project start.

done.summary: User requested archival after confirming acceptance passed.

notes: Requirement created from user feedback: default Project Execution projects no longer show a project-level start button, which makes users feel unable to start the project.
Review conclusion: add a Project Execution-specific project-level start coordinator that selects the next eligible task and delegates to existing task-level Project Execution start.
Checklist draft generated and waiting for user confirmation before todolist creation.

Product clarification added: project toolbar needs a start-mode radio control, default continuous task flow, and task-level manual acceptance configuration. Checklist was updated and remains unconfirmed.
Checklist confirmed by user reply: pass.
Implementation completed and verification commands passed. Waiting for user confirmation of tested state.
Chrome-devtools real browser validation passed against the sandbox-external start.sh service on port 8090.
Follow-up UX fix added: missing reviewer now prompts for explicit skip-review confirmation and persists the confirmation-required toolbar state.
2026-06-17 user confirmed acceptance passed and requested archival; confirmed.tested and confirmed.done were set true and stage advanced to done.
